message: Removed undeclared Enabled live setting from RuntimeConfigurationExample and added PluginAddendumTests coverage that runtime configuration keys are declared by FireDamagePluginPackage and apply successfully. Validation: dotnet test tests/SafeIR.Tests/SafeIR.Tests.csproj --filter FullyQualifiedName~PluginAddendumTests; dotnet build examples/Addendum/SafeIR.AddendumExamples/SafeIR.AddendumExamples.csproj; ./scripts/check-csharp-file-lines.ps1.
